measurement_boundary: Synthetic public example for an early, non-production interoperability pilot.
No raw prompt, raw model output, provider identity, customer data or proprietary schema is included.
This synthetic payload is a runtime observation input only.
It does not establish truth, safety, authority, downstream permission or execution admissibility.
known_limitations: The observed instability does not identify the underlying cause.
No claim can be made about which generated interpretation is correct.

revas_action: Preserve uncertainty; do not collapse to a single confident answer. Require bounded restatement or additional measurement.
score_semantics: First-pass REVAS-side routing estimates, not calibrated production metrics.
required_next_step: Ask ControlTower for repeated challenge/perturbation runs and uncertainty-preserving output.
rationale: Semantic variability and uncertainty are material risk signals; REVAS preserves uncertainty instead of adopting a single confident output. Risk types: semantic_variability, uncertainty.
limitations: Synthetic public pilot example; not production evidence.
NeoMundi behavioral signal is not raw truth or final verifier output.
No raw prompts, raw model outputs, providers, customers, or hidden data inferred.
Original NeoMundi measurement fields are preserved; REVAS interpretation is separate.
boundary_notes: REVAS interpretation layer only: proof before action, adoption gates before downstream use.
No legal/safety/execution admissibility claimed from NeoMundi signal alone.
Fallback safety applies if required verifier/evidence is missing.

router.routing_reason: Elevated semantic variability, high risk level, uncertainty risk type, and uncertain factual status.

executor.reason_if_not_executed: NeoMundi payload contains behavioral measurement signals only; no raw prompt, raw model output, external evidence, or task object was supplied for deterministic execution.

verifier.verification_requirement: Run repeated perturbation/challenge observations to determine whether answer meaning stabilizes.
verifier.verifier_reason: No raw outputs or repeated traces are included; uncertainty must be preserved rather than collapsed.

adoption_gate.fallback_policy: Fallback to uncertainty-preserving response until repeatability evidence reduces semantic instability.

scored_artifact.score_semantics: First-pass REVAS-side routing estimates, not calibrated production metrics.
scored_artifact.required_next_step: Ask ControlTower for repeated challenge/perturbation runs and uncertainty-preserving output.
scored_artifact.rationale: Semantic variability and uncertainty are material risk signals; REVAS preserves uncertainty instead of adopting a single confident output. Risk types: semantic_variability, uncertainty.

public_release_boundary: This artifact is a sanitized public REVAS example for the OmarAGI × NeoMundi technical pilot.
It is not a production record, customer record, certification, endorsement, or proof of deployment.
No raw prompt, raw model output, provider account, customer data, private URL, credential, or operational secret is included.
